name: Crispy String Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound String beans, trimmed and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 cups of cooking oil in a wok and add the string beans. Fry for one minute or until soft, then drain.
2. In a sauté pan, heat the remaining oil. Add the beans, soy sauce, sherry, sugar, chicken broth, sesame oil, and scallion. Stir to heat through. Serve. The crispy texture of the beans makes all the difference.
